task: I’m putting together a really simple Baltimore event night plan and just want the official pages open so I know I’m starting from the right places. Please go to the official Please Find Your Seat site and grab the homepage URL for me, because that’s the event platform I want to use as the anchor for the night. Then find the official Pier 5 Hotel Baltimore website URL so I have a nearby hotel option tied to the same outing, and leave that hotel page open in its own tab so I can look at it afterward. After that, open The Capital Grille’s official homepage and note the restaurant brand name exactly as it appears there, since I want a recognizable dinner option to mention alongside the hotel and event plan. Keep the key pages open in separate tabs and give me a short planning summary with the Please Find Your Seat homepage URL, the Pier 5 Hotel Baltimore official URL, and The Capital Grille homepage URL plus the brand name shown on the page.
grader_reasoning:
R1: success - The agent successfully searched for "Please Find Your Seat official site" and navigated to the official website at https://pleasefindyourseat.com/. This URL is confirmed in the action history (Step 4) and the final summary provided by the agent.

R2: success - The agent successfully identified the official website for the Pier 5 Hotel Baltimore (https://thepier5.com/) and ensured it remained open in a separate tab as part of the final browser state. The URL is correct and the page was verified in the action history.

R3: success - The agent successfully navigated to the official website for The Capital Grille (https://www.thecapitalgrille.com/home). The agent correctly identified the brand name as "The Capital Grille" based on the page content (specifically the logo heading and text throughout the page). The URL and brand name are accurate.

R4: success - The agent provided a summary in the final response (Step 12) that includes the Please Find Your Seat URL (https://pleasefindyourseat.com/), the Pier 5 Hotel Baltimore URL (https://thepier5.com/), and The Capital Grille URL (https://www.thecapitalgrille.com/home) along with the brand name "The Capital Grille". This satisfies all requirements of the rubric.

rubric_results.requirement: Provide the official homepage URL for the Please Find Your Seat event platform.
rubric_results.verification: Grader confirms the returned URL is the official Please Find Your Seat homepage and matches the page opened in the browser.
rubric_results.final_reasoning: The agent successfully searched for "Please Find Your Seat official site" and navigated to the official website at https://pleasefindyourseat.com/. This URL is confirmed in the action history (Step 4) and the final summary provided by the agent.

rubric_results.requirement: Provide the official website URL for Pier 5 Hotel Baltimore and keep the hotel page open in its own tab.
rubric_results.verification: Grader confirms the returned URL is the official Pier 5 Hotel Baltimore site and that the browser shows the hotel page open.
rubric_results.final_reasoning: The agent successfully identified the official website for the Pier 5 Hotel Baltimore (https://thepier5.com/) and ensured it remained open in a separate tab as part of the final browser state. The URL is correct and the page was verified in the action history.

rubric_results.requirement: Provide The Capital Grille official homepage URL and identify the restaurant brand name shown on the homepage.
rubric_results.verification: Grader confirms the URL is The Capital Grille official homepage and the reported brand name matches visible text on the page.
rubric_results.final_reasoning: The agent successfully navigated to the official website for The Capital Grille (https://www.thecapitalgrille.com/home). The agent correctly identified the brand name as "The Capital Grille" based on the page content (specifically the logo heading and text throughout the page). The URL and brand name are accurate.

rubric_results.requirement: Return all four findings together in a short planning summary covering the event platform, hotel, dinner option.
rubric_results.verification: Grader confirms the final response includes the Please Find Your Seat URL, Pier 5 Hotel Baltimore URL, The Capital Grille URL plus brand name.
rubric_results.final_reasoning: The agent provided a summary in the final response (Step 12) that includes the Please Find Your Seat URL (https://pleasefindyourseat.com/), the Pier 5 Hotel Baltimore URL (https://thepier5.com/), and The Capital Grille URL (https://www.thecapitalgrille.com/home) along with the brand name "The Capital Grille". This satisfies all requirements of the rubric.
